ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial year (e.g., 2021, 2020) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  "fiscal_quarters" TEXT /* Fiscal quarters for the year (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "fiscal_month_start" INTEGER /* Month in which the fiscal year starts (1 for January, 7 for July) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year the data belongs to */,
  "revenues" TEXT /* Revenues for the year */,
  "profits" TEXT /* Profits for the year */,
  "assets" TEXT /* Assets for the year */,
  "stockholder_equity" TEXT /* Total stockholder equity for the year */,
  "expenses" TEXT /* Total expenses for the year */,
  "cash_flow" TEXT /* Net cash flow for the year */,
  "debt" TEXT /* Total debt for the year */,
  "equity_ratio" TEXT /* Equity ratio for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial indicator */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial indicator (e.g., revenue growth rate) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the financial indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial indicator (e.g., Growth, Ratio, Margin) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for the indicator (e.g., Yearly, Quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_indicators_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpis" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business unit the KPI belongs to */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI */,
  "target_value" TEXT /* Target value for the KPI */,
  "actual_value" TEXT /* Actual value for the KPI */,
  "kpi_type" TEXT /* Type of the KPI (e.g., Financial, Operational, Strategic) */,
  "kpi_period" TEXT /* Period for the KPI (e.g., Yearly, Quarterly, Monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the KPI */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the KPI was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpis_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpis_business_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_unit_id") REFERENCES business_units ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business unit */,
  "business_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business unit */,
  "parent_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent business unit (if any) */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the business unit (e.g., Department, Division, Team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, executive, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year the budget belongs to */,
  "budget_amount" TEXT /* Budget amount for the year */,
  "budget_type" TEXT /* Type of the budget (e.g., Operating, Capital) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the budget */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial year the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_amount" TEXT /* Forecast amount for the year */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of the forecast (e.g., Sales, Revenue, Expenses) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forecast */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., General, Audit, Review) */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the comment */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_comments_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data the audit belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was made */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Action taken during the audit (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit action */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the audit entry */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)
